videos.title: How to Use Claude (Basically) for Free
videos.description: Three proven methods to run Claude Code with no subscription: OpenRouter (pennies per session), NVIDIA NIM (free credits), and Ollama (fully local, forever free). Pick the one that fits you and be up and running in under 10 minutes.

videos.title: Run Claude Code Free with Ollama
videos.description: Use Claude Code with open-source models through Ollama's Anthropic-compatible API — no Claude subscription, no API bill. One command gets you running in under 5 minutes.

videos.title: 200+ AI Models, One Studio — Open Generative AI
videos.description: Flux, Kling, Veo 3, Sora, Imagen 4 — every major image and video model in one open-source studio. One muapi API key unlocks all of them. Runs in your browser in under 5 minutes, no subscription.

videos.title: GoodMode v2 — The Prompt That Supercharges ChatGPT
videos.description: Turn ChatGPT into a cross-disciplinary strategist with 100x the critical thinking. Paste once into your custom instructions and every chat from then on runs through the framework — sharper questions, structured reasoning, and real sources instead of vibes.

resources.label: Get the full GoodMode v2 prompt

videos.title: Claude Code: Steps 1-5
videos.description: Total-beginner setup guide — from zero to your first Claude Code session in about 30 minutes. Mac and Windows covered.
